zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick of Salisbury於大約1122年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire37歲，母親Sibyl Chaworth42歲。他於1147年1月19日之後與Adela Talvas在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利波特芝士被列為governor of poitou。他去世於1168年3月27日在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維安享年47歲，埋葬在法國阿奎泰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick of Salisbury于大约1122年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire37岁，母亲Sibyl Chaworth42岁。他于1147年1月19日之后与Adela Talvas在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利波特芝士被列为governor of poitou。他去世于1168年3月27日在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維安享年47岁，埋葬在法国阿奎泰。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Salisbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name primarily from Salesbury in Blackburn (Lancashire) but also occasionally from Salisbury (Wiltshire). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + burg ‘fortress’, while the Wiltshire placename arises from a shortened form of the Celtic placename Sorviodunum (from an unknown initial element + Celtic dūno- ‘fort’). In the Old English period the second element was dropped and Sorvio- (of unexplained etymology) became Searo- in Old English as the result of folk etymological association the Old English word searu ‘trick’; to this an explanatory burh ‘fortress, manor, town’ was added. The city is recorded in the Domesday Book as Sarisberie; the change of -r- to -l- is the result of later dissimilation.

variants.name: Salsbury
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of Salomon or some other Jewish name beginning with Sa-.

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick of Salisbury was born about 1122, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire, was 37 and his mother, Sibyl Chaworth, was 42. He married Adela Talvas after 19 January 1147, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as governor of poitou in Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France. He died on 27 March 1168, in Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 47, and was buried in Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick of Salisbury est né environ 1122, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Chaworth, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Adela Talvas après 19 janvier 1147, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est governor of poitou à Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France. Il est décédé le 27 mars 1168, à Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick of Salisbury um 1122 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire 37 und seine Mutter Sibyl Chaworth 42. Er hat nach 19. Januar 1147 in Wiltshire, England Adela Talvas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als governor of poitou in Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. März 1168 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick of Salisbury è nato il circa 1122 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl Chaworth, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Adela Talvas dopo il 19 gennaio 1147, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come governor of poitou nel Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Morì il 27 marzo 1168, nel Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick of Salisburyが約1122年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshireは37歳，母Sibyl Chaworthは42歳であった。1147年1月19日以後にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでAdela Talvasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエンテ-マリティメポイトウでの職業はgovernor of poitouと記録されている。彼は1168年3月27日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアヴィエンで47歳で死去し，フランスアクイティアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick of Salisbury(이)가 대략 1122년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl Chaworth(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1147년 1월 19일 이후 영국 윌츠히르에서 Adela Talvas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처테-마이팀 포이토우에서 governor of poitou이었다. 그는 1168년 3월 27일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르 비니에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 아키테인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick of Salisbury nasceu aproximadamente 1122, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Chaworth, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Adela Talvas após 19 de janeiro de 1147, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como governor of poitou em Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, França. Ele faleceu em 27 de março de 1168, em Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick of Salisbury родился около 1122 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Chaworth, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Adela Talvas после 19 январь 1147 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии governor of poitou в местности поитоу, чаренте-маритим, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. Он умер 27 марта 1168 г. в местности виенн, исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patrick of Salisbury nació aproximadamente 1122, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Sibyl Chaworth, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Adela Talvas después de 19 de enero de 1147, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era governor of poitou en Poitou, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1168, en Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Aquitaine, Francia.
